tests.name: TestMissionDashboardCompactLongRunStatus
asserts: compact_long_run_status reports 14/60 nodes, min_nodes=15, ready=46, checkpoint count, elapsed/min minutes, lease, return gate, and final_response_allowed=false
compact_readback_statuses reports workgraph, Foundry, Promoter, Command, checkpoint freshness, and early-return risk
JSON output preserves total_nodes, completed_nodes, return_gate_status, and final_response_allowed

tests.name: TestMissionDashboardReadsCompactReadback
asserts: existing compact dashboard readback remains compatible
